pages.title: ✅ Do This
pages.text: $(li)$(bold)Configure in BUILDING$(): Set up all faces before starting simulation $(li)$(bold)Simulate long enough$(): 60+ seconds for accurate rates $(li)$(bold)Stock inputs before SIMULATING$(): Ensure steady supply during measurement $(li)$(bold)Let CACHED run$(): Don't interfere, just monitor $(li)$(bold)Fix HALTED quickly$(): Add inputs, clear outputs

pages.title: ❌ Don't Do This
pages.text: $(li)$(bold)Don't end simulation early$(): Inaccurate rates $(li)$(bold)Don't modify factory during SIMULATING$(): Invalidates measurement $(li)$(bold)Don't expect instant CACHED results$(): Production is rate-based (may be slow) $(li)$(bold)Don't reload/forceload CM chunks in HALTED$(): Defeats the purpose (stay unloaded)$(br2)---
